Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Capital (The Elder Empire: Sea)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — The Capital is a location mentioned in the burned message.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — The Capital is a city that night cannot conquer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Imperial Palace's resources were used for keeping the Capital running and funding the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — The Capital contains wealthy districts and Imperial homes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — The Capital was swallowed in chaos for a few months after the Emperor's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The Capital contains ancient spires and gleaming clock-towers.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — The Capital is a destination mentioned by Andel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — The Capital is a location Bliss intends to return to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Capital is a location that can be approached by sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The population of the Capital has been acclimated to the idea of a leader for years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — The Capital is a location where prisoners face trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Capital is a location with an upper crust of influential people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — The Capital is a location containing Kanatalia workshops.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — The Consultants were to be escorted back to the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — The Capital is a vast city that swallows the coastline.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Capital's population surged for the coronation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Capital's military harbor is tiny compared to Candle Bay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The characters are sticking around the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Capital contains a Navigator chapter house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperial Palace takes up almost twenty percent of the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — The Capital is a location from which Captain Tommison sailed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Capital contains the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Capital is visible through a rift in the void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Capital contains a bell tower rooftop.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Bliss attempted to transport herself directly to the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Capital is where the gathered citizens are located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Champions were being found dead all over the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Capital is buzzing and people are screaming that the Imperial Palace has fallen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The streets of the Capital are lit by sunset-orange quicklamps at night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — The Capital features a well-furnished living room style.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Calder sat on a throne in the center of the Capital in the vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — The Capital is in a state of chaos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — The Capital contains a high concentration of Optasia statues.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — The Capital is a location that can be protected by the White Sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — The Capital is filled with wards against the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Calder flew back through the Capital.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
